tasks.label: Commit and Push Project
tasks.command: git add . && git commit -m "Initial commit with complete MetaIQ project" && git push -u origin main

tasks.label: Commit and Push Project
tasks.command: git add . ; git commit -m "Initial commit with complete MetaIQ project" ; git push -u origin main

tasks.label: Git Commit
tasks.command: git commit -m "Initial commit with complete MetaIQ project"

tasks.label: Git Commit
tasks.command: git commit -m 'Initial commit with complete MetaIQ project'

tasks.label: Git Commit
tasks.command: git commit --message="Initial commit with complete MetaIQ project"

tasks.label: Commit All Changes
tasks.command: git add . && git commit -m "feat: implement critical fixes and architecture improvements" && git push -u origin feat/copilot-wip

tasks.label: Commit Refactoring Report
tasks.command: git add REFACTORING_COMPLETE.md && git commit -m refactoring-report

tasks.label: Commit TypeScript Config Fixes
tasks.command: git add metaiq-frontend/tsconfig.json metaiq-backend/tsconfig.json && git commit -m fix-typescript-config-errors
